questions.hindi: उसने पूछा, "क्या तुम आ रहे हो?"
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Asked + if/whether (yes/no) or WH word + subject + verb | Told/Ordered + object + to + base verb (commands)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "He asked, "Are you coming?""
questions.category: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands practice

questions.hindi: उसने पूछा कि क्या मैं आ रहा था।
questions.english: He asked if I was coming.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Asked + if/whether (yes/no) or WH word + subject + verb | Told/Ordered + object + to + base verb (commands)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "He asked if I was coming."
questions.category: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands practice

questions.hindi: उसने पूछा, "तुम कहाँ रहते हो?"
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Asked + if/whether (yes/no) or WH word + subject + verb | Told/Ordered + object + to + base verb (commands)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "She asked, "Where do you live?""
questions.category: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands practice

questions.hindi: उसने पूछा कि मैं कहाँ रहता था।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Asked + if/whether (yes/no) or WH word + subject + verb | Told/Ordered + object + to + base verb (commands)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "She asked where I lived."
questions.category: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands practice

questions.hindi: उसने कहा, "यह काम करो।"
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Asked + if/whether (yes/no) or WH word + subject + verb | Told/Ordered + object + to + base verb (commands)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "He said, "Do this work.""
questions.category: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands practice

questions.hindi: उसने मुझे यह काम करने को कहा।
questions.english: He told me to do this work.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Asked + if/whether (yes/no) or WH word + subject + verb | Told/Ordered + object + to + base verb (commands)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "He told me to do this work."
questions.category: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands practice

questions.hindi: उसने कहा, "यहाँ मत आओ।"
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Asked + if/whether (yes/no) or WH word + subject + verb | Told/Ordered + object + to + base verb (commands)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "She said, "Do not come here.""
questions.category: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands practice

questions.hindi: उसने मुझे यहाँ न आने को कहा।
questions.english: She told me not to come here.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Asked + if/whether (yes/no) or WH word + subject + verb | Told/Ordered + object + to + base verb (commands)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "She told me not to come here."
questions.category: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands practice

questions.hindi: उन्होंने पूछा, "क्या तुम तैयार हो?"
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Asked + if/whether (yes/no) or WH word + subject + verb | Told/Ordered + object + to + base verb (commands)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "They asked, "Are you ready?""
questions.category: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands practice

questions.hindi: उन्होंने पूछा कि क्या मैं तैयार था।
questions.english: They asked if I was ready.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Asked + if/whether (yes/no) or WH word + subject + verb | Told/Ordered + object + to + base verb (commands)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "They asked if I was ready."
questions.category: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands practice

questions.hindi: उसने पूछा, "तुम क्या कर रहे हो?"
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Asked + if/whether (yes/no) or WH word + subject + verb | Told/Ordered + object + to + base verb (commands)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "He asked, "What are you doing?""
questions.category: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands practice

questions.hindi: उसने पूछा कि मैं क्या कर रहा था।
questions.english: He asked what I was doing.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Asked + if/whether (yes/no) or WH word + subject + verb | Told/Ordered + object + to + base verb (commands)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "He asked what I was doing."
questions.category: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands practice

questions.hindi: टीचर ने कहा, "चुप रहो।"
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Asked + if/whether (yes/no) or WH word + subject + verb | Told/Ordered + object + to + base verb (commands)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "The teacher said, "Be quiet.""
questions.category: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands practice

questions.hindi: टीचर ने हमें चुप रहने को कहा।
questions.english: The teacher told us to be quiet.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Asked + if/whether (yes/no) or WH word + subject + verb | Told/Ordered + object + to + base verb (commands)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "The teacher told us to be quiet."
questions.category: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands practice

questions.hindi: उसने पूछा, "तुम कब आओगे?"
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Asked + if/whether (yes/no) or WH word + subject + verb | Told/Ordered + object + to + base verb (commands)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "She asked, "When will you come?""
questions.category: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands practice

questions.hindi: उसने पूछा कि मैं कब आऊँगा।
questions.english: She asked when I would come.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Asked + if/whether (yes/no) or WH word + subject + verb | Told/Ordered + object + to + base verb (commands)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "She asked when I would come."
questions.category: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands practice

questions.hindi: डॉक्टर ने कहा, "दवा लो।"
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Asked + if/whether (yes/no) or WH word + subject + verb | Told/Ordered + object + to + base verb (commands)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "The doctor said, "Take medicine.""
questions.category: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands practice

questions.hindi: डॉक्टर ने मुझे दवा लेने को कहा।
questions.english: The doctor told me to take medicine.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Asked + if/whether (yes/no) or WH word + subject + verb | Told/Ordered + object + to + base verb (commands)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "The doctor told me to take medicine."
questions.category: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands practice

questions.hindi: उसने पूछा, "क्या तुम्हें मदद चाहिए?"
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Asked + if/whether (yes/no) or WH word + subject + verb | Told/Ordered + object + to + base verb (commands)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "He asked, "Do you need help?""
questions.category: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands practice

questions.hindi: उसने पूछा कि क्या मुझे मदद चाहिए थी।
questions.english: He asked if I needed help.
